arts.ttl: Benfica Head Motivates David Neres Sale to Napoli
arts.sum: Former Milan and Fiorentina legend and current Benfica president Rui Costa has revisited the sale of Davide Neres to Napoli. The Partenopei paid €28M for the speedster, who cracked Serie A’s record books thanks to three consecutive assists. arts.ttl: Chelsea 'plot £130m double Bundesliga raid' as Victor Osimhen alternative emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly add RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba and Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface to their list of 2025 transfer targets.

Victor Osimhen ’s agent has claimed that “someone made a mistake” in the summer such that the Nigeria international wound up at Galatasaray on loan from Napoli and not at Chelsea or PSG . Osimhen was linked with a big-money move from the Serie A club to Chelsea or PSG, yet he finds himself in Turkey until at least January and potentially until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Star Midfielder Thriving in Naples: “I Felt the Fire Inside Me When Napoli Called”
arts.sum: Scott McTominay has quickly grown to become one of the protagonists at Napoli despite joining the club less than a month ago. The Italian giants purchased the Scotland international from Manchester United for a reported fee of £25.7 million only 24 hours before the deadline. arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Man Utd decided not to sign Ivan Toney and Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: ESPN claim that over the last couple of years, the club were alerted to Toney while at Brentford and Osimhen when he was in scintillating form for Napoli. Manchester United harboured reservations over Ivan Toney and Victor Osimhen which led to them abandoning pursuits for the strikers, a report has revealed.

arts.ttl: Connor Barron inspired by Napoli's Scottish imports as Rangers star hopes to make Europa League splash
arts.sum: The Ibrox midfielder was called up to the Scotland squad for the first time for the Nations League double header against Poland and Portugal
